name: Savory Stuffed Peppers
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove tops and seeds from green peppers. Stand pepper cups upright in a microwave-safe baking dish.
2. Wash and pick over peas. Place in a medium saucepan with 1 1/4 cups water and vegetable broth mix. Bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat, cover and simmer for 30 minutes.
4. In a large saucepan, saute onions, garlic, and mushrooms in Balsamic vinegar. Remove from heat and stir in peas, along with cumin, oregano, and salt. Set aside.
5. In a small saucepan, bring one cup of water to a boil, add couscous, and remove from heat. Cover and let stand for 5 minutes.
6. Stir the cooked couscous into the pea-vegetable mixture with half of the tomatoes. Stuff peppers with the mixture, cover, and microwave on high for 5 minutes (about 8 minutes in my experience).
7. Top with remaining tomatoes and serve.
